title: ReAct: reasoning and acting loop
key_points: ReAct alternates reasoning and action so the model can update a plan after observing external information.
For interviews, the equivalent action is retrieving evidence before deciding the next follow-up.
The useful product pattern is not exposing chain-of-thought, but exposing evidence and next action.
probe_templates: 你这个 Agent 每一步的状态、动作和观察分别是什么？失败后怎么重试或回滚？
如果工具返回空结果或错误结果，系统怎么判断该继续问、换工具还是降级？
anti_patterns: 只说用了 Agent，没有说清楚状态、动作、观察和异常路径。
把多轮提示词包装成 Agent，但没有工具、状态或失败处理。

title: Self-RAG: retrieval plus self-critique
key_points: Self-RAG retrieves on demand and critiques retrieved passages and generated outputs.
The transferable idea is a generation step followed by a verifier/critic step.
For mock interviews, critic should reject generic questions that do not cite resume evidence or technical sources.
probe_templates: 你怎么判断这一轮需要检索资料，而不是直接追问？检索不到时怎么处理？
你的回答或问题有没有自检标准？怎么拦截幻觉、泛泛追问和无依据评价？
anti_patterns: 固定塞入若干文档，不判断是否相关。
生成后没有评估 factuality、citation 或任务约束。

title: Microsoft GraphRAG query modes
key_points: GraphRAG separates local search, global search, DRIFT search and question generation.
For interviews, local search maps to resume evidence and global search maps to domain-level rubrics.
Question generation can be treated as a first-class retrieval output, not just a final LLM prompt.
probe_templates: 你怎么区分从简历局部证据追问，和从岗位通用知识体系追问？
如果候选人的项目跨多个技术域，你的检索排序和追问优先级怎么定？
anti_patterns: 只做向量相似度，无法解释为什么这轮应该问这个问题。
检索结果无法映射到面试题纲或评分维度。

title: LLM-as-an-Interviewer dynamic evaluation
key_points: Interview-style evaluation uses dynamic multi-turn interactions rather than static one-shot tests.
Follow-up questions reveal adaptability, clarification ability and real-world applicability.
The final report should aggregate concrete examples from the interaction.
probe_templates: 上一轮回答里哪个点最需要澄清？为什么这个澄清能区分真实做过和只会背？
复盘时你会引用哪一句回答作为证据，而不是给泛泛建议？
anti_patterns: 每轮随机换题，不能沿着候选人的回答深挖。
复盘只给分数，不引用具体回答证据。

title: PyMuPDF OCR with Tesseract
key_points: PyMuPDF can OCR PDF pages by calling Tesseract through get_textpage_ocr.
OCR is much slower than native text extraction, so it should only run when needed.
The OCR output can then be read through normal text extraction methods.
probe_templates: 你的 PDF 解析怎么判断是否需要 OCR？OCR 失败或很慢时怎么降级？
扫描简历和文本型 PDF 的解析路径有什么不同？
anti_patterns: 所有 PDF 都 OCR，导致慢且浪费。
扫描 PDF 解析失败时只报错，没有文本粘贴兜底。

title: MySQL InnoDB transaction isolation levels
key_points: InnoDB supports READ UNCOMMITTED, READ COMMITTED, REPEATABLE READ and SERIALIZABLE.
MySQL default InnoDB isolation is REPEATABLE READ.
Different isolation levels use different locking strategies and trade consistency for overhead.
probe_templates: 你项目里的订单或库存操作在什么隔离级别下跑？为什么这个级别够用？
如果两个请求并发扣减同一行库存，会发生什么锁竞争或死锁路径？
anti_patterns: 只背四种隔离级别，不说自己项目里的读写路径。
说用了事务，但没有解释锁范围、索引条件和失败重试。

title: Redis distributed locks and Redlock
key_points: Redis documents a canonical distributed lock pattern and the Redlock algorithm.
Correct locks need unique values, expiration and safe release semantics.
Interview-worthy risk points include lease timeout, clock drift, client pause and duplicate work.
probe_templates: 如果你用 Redis 锁防重复提交，锁值、过期时间和释放条件怎么设计？
业务执行超过锁 TTL 或服务暂停时，会不会出现并发写？怎么兜底？
anti_patterns: 只说 setnx 加锁，不说随机 token、过期和释放校验。
把 Redis 锁当成强一致事务，不讨论失败窗口。

title: Kafka exactly-once processing design
key_points: Kafka exactly-once processing depends on producer and consumer transaction coordination.
The producer must use a transactional id for transactional delivery.
Even when Kafka helps, business handlers still need idempotency around side effects.
probe_templates: 你的消息通知或订单异步处理如何做到幂等？幂等键放在哪里？
如果消费成功但数据库写失败，或者数据库写成功但提交 offset 失败，会怎么恢复？
anti_patterns: 说 MQ 天然可靠，但不讨论重复消费和业务幂等。
把 exactly-once 当成端到端业务无重复，不区分消息系统和业务副作用。

title: Milvus hybrid search reranking
key_points: Milvus hybrid search merges multiple ANN search result sets through reranking.
Reranking is a separate step from initial retrieval and affects final relevance.
Good RAG interviews should ask how candidates tune recall, rerank and final precision.
probe_templates: 你怎么判断召回错了还是 rerank 错了？分别看哪些日志或指标？
向量检索 topK、rerank 阈值和最终上下文条数是怎么定的？
anti_patterns: 只说用了 Milvus/向量库，不说 topK、召回率、rerank 或坏例。
把 embedding 相似度当成最终答案可信度。

title: GPTInterviewer resume and job description flow
key_points: Open-source mock interview products commonly personalize questions from resumes and job descriptions.
The differentiation opportunity is deeper technical follow-up and evidence-backed feedback.
A simple chat or voice wrapper is not enough for Chinese technical internship preparation.
probe_templates: 你的产品比直接把简历和 JD 丢给通用聊天机器人强在哪里？
问题生成有没有岗位依据、简历依据和上一轮回答依据？
anti_patterns: 只生成一组静态问题，不做连续追问。
只做语音壳子，问题质量仍然泛泛。
